chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2075 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 8207/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 8208/25 4.For orders on CMA 8209/25 5.For hearing of main case 08-12-2025 Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that for redressal of his grievance, the petitioner will avail alternate remedy, available under the law. Order accordingly. Instant petition along with listed application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
